hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
# first run: May 25, 2026 cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
### OK 1of4: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. ### source is: 20_ENV_final.tar.gz ### generates FILENAME-with-hC.tar.gz #php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "20_ENV_final", "task": "gen_hC_using_ancestry"}' #using kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus
### OK 2of4: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "20_ENV_final-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_1
### OK 3of4: Start matching taxa php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "20_ENV_final-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID exit 0
### OK 4of4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. ### REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "20_ENV_final-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen 20_ENV_final_finale php analyze_MoF.php _ '{"resource_id": "20_ENV_final_finale"}' ### rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp 20_ENV_final_finale.tar.gz ZooKeys_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt 20_ENV_final_finale.tar.gz ls -lt ZooKeys_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f 20_ENV_final_finale.tar.gz
